design_philosophy: Deep moody, cinematic, and expensive. Combining a 'nocturne' aesthetic with dark forest greens, charcoal, and warm brass/gold accents. This is a luxe café and lifestyle hub that feels like an exclusive, old-money establishment. The marketing side uses editorial asymmetry and large photography with dark overlays, while the admin dashboard translates this luxury into a high-contrast 'command center'.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none text-[#FDFBF7]
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight leading-tight text-[#FDFBF7]
hierarchy.small_label: text-xs md:text-sm font-semibold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#C8A97E]

layout_and_spacing.marketing_strategy: Generous spacing (p-12, p-24, py-32). The 'Tetris' Bento Grid (Mode A) for the spaces showcase to create visual tension and artful asymmetry. Large hero images must have a max black/50 or black/60 overlay to ensure text readability without killing the image.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_strategy: The 'Control Room' Grid (Mode B). Dense but breathable. Cards use #151F19 background with a delicate 1px border of #C8A97E/15. Subtle lift on hover.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard, utilizing py-24 to py-32 for main marketing sections.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: Subtle. rounded-none for a purely editorial look, or maximum rounded-md (6px) for softer luxury.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C8A97E] text-[#0B120E] hover:bg-[#A68658] transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-medium uppercase tracking-widest text-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#C8A97E] text-[#C8A97E] hover:bg-[#C8A97E]/10 transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-medium uppercase tracking-widest text-sm

cards.marketing: bg-[#151F19] border border-white/5 p-8 transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 duration-500
cards.dashboard: bg-[#151F19] border border-[#C8A97E]/15 rounded-md p-6 shadow-2xl

inputs_and_forms.style: bg-transparent border-b border-[#C8A97E]/30 rounded-none px-0 py-3 text-[#FDFBF7] focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#C8A97E] placeholder:text-[#A3A59E]/50 transition-colors

navigation.style: fixed w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0B120E]/80 border-b border-[#C8A97E]/10

motion.hover_effects: Subtle brightness shifts, slow image scaling (1.05x) within hidden overflow containers, and text color transitions.

landing.hero: Full viewport height. Background image of the facade/interior with a moody overlay. Large serif text: 'One place. Many stories.'
landing.spaces_showcase: Asymmetric bento grid highlighting Urban Café, Pilates Studio, PlayZone, and Banquet. Each section uses high-quality imagery and minimal text.
landing.menu_preview: Editorial two-column list. Minimalist typography for item names, separated by a subtle dotted line or space from the price.
landing.reservation: Dark, sleek form on a #151F19 background card. Emphasize date/time and guest count inputs.
landing.footer: Deep padding (py-32), large brand logo, subtle social links.

staff_login.layout: Centered card on a dark green background. Input fields as described in components. Primary button for login.

admin_dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (Reservations, Menu, Settings) + Main content area. Dark theme maintained.
admin_dashboard.table: Shadcn UI table customized with #151F19 backgrounds, #C8A97E text for headers, and subtle borders. Status badges use distinct but muted luxury colors (e.g., Gold for confirmed, Gray for pending).

image_urls.description: Woman performing Pilates on a reformer machine
Luxurious banquet hall setup with elegant chandeliers
Child playing a video game in an arcade, dark moody
Textured abstract image with gold and green hues

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Use Lucide React for icons (stroke-width 1.5 for elegance).
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use Cormorant Garamond or a similar elegant serif.
Ensure the hero image has an explicit bg-black/60 overlay applied over it to keep the white/cream text legible.
Admin dashboard should not look like standard Vercel/Stripe. Keep the deep green #0B120E background and use #C8A97E (gold) for primary accents/buttons.
Implement simple JWT auth for the /staff route, protecting the admin dashboard.
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for marketing layout asymmetry, but heavily customized Shadcn components for forms, inputs, tables, and dialogs.
Avoid standard 'cards' with heavy box shadows in the marketing site; opt for flat editorial structures separated by whitespace or delicate 1px lines.
